race.comment: MILK FOAM (4) has returned in good order this prep and a maiden win appears imminent. Caught the eye last start when she stretched out nicely to get up for a close third over 1000m at Gosford. Back in trip is not perfect, but the long run home at Newcastle appeals. FARNCIFUL (5) started favourite on debut over this course and distance in August but struggled through heavy ground and missed the placings. Turned out after that run. Won a recent Beaumont trial - looks ready to hit the ground running. PRECIOUS GIRL (6) is back from a three-month spell. Raced three times over today's track and trip last prep for two placings and a close fifth. Consistent mare who is capable of taking this out. LOVE YOU ANYWAY (9) has been freshened up since a close second over 1000m at Port Macquarie on 6 January. Can run a cheeky race with the help of the inside gate. CREDIBILITY (1) placed in a recent Beaumont trial and is in the mix on debut for the Kris Lees stable.
